name: Hayes, Emmitt

evidence: Emmitt W. Hayes owns 4001 Turquoise Cove, Austin 78749 (matches donor zip). Career public servant: retired 2014 as Director of Probation Services, Travis County Juvenile Probation Dept; now workforce-development/juvenile-justice consultant, Integral Care trustee, Neighborhood Housing Services board member. Gave to county commissioner Jeff Travillion.
